name: Content Route To Role Rework Policy Pipeline
description: Content workflow that routes specific findings back to an upstream strategist for reframing.
outcome: A required assessor can route subject rework back to a different role instead of reopening the same subject worker.

definition.process_instructions: The content strategist frames the change. The content author drafts it. The quality assessor and brand assessor evaluate it. Brand rejection routes back to the content strategist for reframing before another draft revision proceeds.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.
